description_long: This object is a blocky, stylized airplane with a gray exterior and prominent straight wings extending from the midsection. The wings feature blue and red cross insignias, suggesting a military or medical transport role. The fuselage is rectangular with a cockpit at the front, marked by transparent blocks representing windows and a blue-and-red checkered pattern on the side. The tail section is tall and boxy, with twin vertical stabilizers and a horizontal stabilizer connecting them. The landing gear is visible beneath the fuselage, with two main gear legs and a smaller nose gear. The surface appears to be constructed from uniform, modular blocks, giving it a pixelated, digital appearance.
description: A blocky, gray airplane with straight mid-mounted wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and blue-red insignias, featuring a front cockpit and visible landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, straight wings with cross insignias and the open landing gear beneath the fuselage.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the cockpit windows, side insignia, and the blocky tail with twin vertical stabilizers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin vertical stabilizers, horizontal stabilizer, and the squared-off tail section.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cockpit, landing gear, and tail configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight, rectangular wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: No visible external engines; engine type not visually apparent.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers connected by a horizontal stabilizer, forming an H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear, all fixed and non-retractable.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multi-seat configuration and blocky transparent windows.
